reasoning: Koren, we're focusing on your primary limiter: lactate clearance. Your last ride was solid but we're targeting that 9.3% power drop. This workout is designed to enhance your ability to maintain higher power on steep segments like those on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 min intervals with 5 min at 245-256W, 5 min at 201-218W. Focus on smooth power transitions.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
